rooms.json.description: Per-room core hashes + metadata for the BSD-3-Clause room detection scanner (odtheking, in SecretRoutes 1.21.10-fabric).

routes.json.description: Per-room secret routes recorded by Zyra et al. Forked from yourboykyle/SecretRoutes (GPL-3.0).

pearlroutes.json.description: Per-room enderpearl routes. Forked from yourboykyle/SecretRoutes (GPL-3.0).
